summary: Focana 1.8.0 makes check-ins and resume prompts calmer when you step away.
improvements: Missed check-ins now pause your timer and bring back Ready to resume a few minutes later.
Ready to resume keeps checking back until you resume or snooze.
fixes: Ready to resume no longer keeps appearing for the same saved task after you have already seen it.
Fixed a lingering pulse after finishing a check-in.
Smoothed out wake and resume handoffs.
